amazonmq.broker.encryptionoptions.CfnAbo:
Encryption options for the broker.

**Important**  
Does not apply to RabbitMQ brokers.

amazonmq.broker.encryptionoptions.KmsKey.Description: The customer master key (CMK) to use for the A AWS KMS (KMS). This key is used to encrypt your data at rest. If not provided, Amazon MQ will use a default CMK to encrypt your data.

amazonmq.broker.encryptionoptions.UseAws.Description: Enables the use of an AWS owned CMK using AWS KMS (KMS). Set to `true` by default, if no value is provided, for example, for RabbitMQ brokers.
